Container.Name: Mousehole
Container.Overview: Mousehole is a background service to update a seedbox IP for MAM and an HTTP server to manage it. Mousehole stores a MAM session cookie; keep authentication enabled and avoid exposing the WebUI to mixed-trust networks.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for accessing the Mousehole web interface

Config.Name: Auth Password
Config.Description: Password for Mousehole web UI, API, and WebSocket authentication

Config.Name: Allowed Hosts
Config.Description: Comma-separated hostnames or IP addresses allowed to access Mousehole, such as your Unraid server IP or hostname. Set this when opening the WebUI through http://[IP]:5010.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for localization of API times (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/London)

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Directory to persist cookie data and application state
